    <!-- Structured Data: Organization, WebSite, FAQPage -->
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@graph": [
        {
          "@type": "Organization",
          "@id": "https://luxemia.shop/#org",
          "name": "LuxeMia",
          "url": "https://luxemia.shop",
          "logo": "https://luxemia.shop/logo.png",
          "description": "Luxury Indian ethnic wear online store. Designer sarees, lehengas, salwar suits and kurtas shipped worldwide.",
          "sameAs": [
            "https://www.instagram.com/luxemiashop",
            "https://www.facebook.com/luxemiashop",
            "https://www.pinterest.com/luxemiashop"
          ]
        },
        {
          "@type": "WebSite",
          "@id": "https://luxemia.shop/#website",
          "name": "LuxeMia",
          "url": "https://luxemia.shop",
          "publisher": { "@id": "https://luxemia.shop/#org" }
        },
        {
          "@type": "FAQPage",
          "mainEntity": [
            {
              "@type": "Question",
              "name": "Do you offer international shipping for Indian ethnic wear?",
              "acceptedAnswer": {
                "@type": "Answer",
                "text": "Yes, LuxeMia offers free worldwide shipping, including to the USA, UK, Canada, and many other countries. You can find more details on our Shipping Policy page."
              }
            },
            {
              "@type": "Question",
              "name": "What is your return policy for international orders?",
              "acceptedAnswer": {
                "@type": "Answer",
                "text": "We offer a hassle-free 7-day return policy for most items. Please refer to our Returns Policy page for full details on international returns and exchanges."
              }
            },
            {
              "@type": "Question",
              "name": "Are your products authentic Indian ethnic wear?",
              "acceptedAnswer": {
                "@type": "Answer",
                "text": "Absolutely. At LuxeMia, we are committed to preserving Indian textile heritage. Every piece is sourced directly from master craftsmen across India, ensuring authentic designs and high-quality materials."
              }
            },
            {
              "@type": "Question",
              "name": "Can I get custom sizing or alterations for my outfit?",
              "acceptedAnswer": {
                "@type": "Answer",
                "text": "We understand the importance of a perfect fit. While many of our items are ready-to-wear, we do offer custom alteration services for select products. Please contact our styling assistance team for more information."
              }
            },
            {
              "@type": "Question",
              "name": "How can I ensure the color of the outfit is accurate when viewing online?",
              "acceptedAnswer": {
                "@type": "Answer",
                "text": "We strive for accurate color representation in our product photography. However, slight color variations may occur due to screen settings and lighting. We recommend reviewing all available product images and descriptions."
              }
            },
            {
              "@type": "Question",
              "name": "Do I need to pay customs duties or taxes on international orders?",
              "acceptedAnswer": {
                "@type": "Answer",
                "text": "While LuxeMia offers free shipping, customers are responsible for any customs duties, taxes, or import fees levied by their country of residence. Please check with your local customs office for more information."
              }
            },
            {
              "@type": "Question",
              "name": "How can I get styling advice for a specific occasion?",
              "acceptedAnswer": {
                "@type": "Answer",
                "text": "Our dedicated styling assistance team is here to help! You can chat with us directly via WhatsApp for personalized recommendations and expert advice."
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
    </script>
